examples: Others, like the horned triceratops, were clearly adapted to shearing plant for food.
Triceratops, had little room in its horn-covered head for smelling equipment.
This group, which includes such famous names as Stegosaurus and Triceratops, is one of the two clades into which the dinosaurs are divided.
Sauropodomorphs included ground-shaking giants like Apatasaurus, and ornithischians included a range of dinosaurs, such as Stegosaurus and Triceratops.
The protagonists are a tribe of intelligent triceratops who communicate with each other by way of an organic network.
